PathOfBuilding.Notes: Archetype stage: leveling Leveling Boneshatter Slayer setup focused on early campaign progression. Applied changes: - Set class=Duelist ascendancy=Slayer - Set level=28 - Selected tree 'Boneshatter Slayer Leveling' - Set main skill to Boneshatter in group 4 - Set movement group 5 to: Leap Slam - Added War Banner to group 1 - Added Blood and Sand to group 2 - Added Ancestral Protector to group 3 - Added Molten Shell to group 5 - Set config enemyLevel=28
